RHAPSODY OF REALITIES - 22ND JULY 2026
"What a declaration of an amazing truth! The Lord is my light and my salvation. Did you observe that David didn’t call Him his saviour but his salvation? This is so powerful! When you declare that the Lord is your salvation, you’re saying in essence that you carry with you the phenomenon of salvation..."NB: Rhapsody is in ALL Languages
